release_notes: chrome.exe was exiting 2147483651 with 'Sandbox cannot access executable …\chrome.exe. Отказано в доступе. (0x5)' — Chromium sandbox subprocess drops to low integrity and ACL-checks the parent binary, which fails on non-ASCII (Cyrillic) paths. Added --no-sandbox to both chrome:launch and the fingerprint probe. Probe also gets --no-zygote/--disable-gpu/--disable-software-rasterizer and dumps the first 5KB of stdout/stderr to main.log on timeout instead of just rejecting.
